narrative:
Athens Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 329 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.2 percentage points.
